title: My Skills
subtitle: Technologies and tools that I use to bring products to life

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Possess strong communication and interpersonal skills, a positive and collaborative attitude. Able to integrate seamlessly into diverse teams and foster strong relationships among team members.

problemSolving.title: Problem-solving
problemSolving.description: Demonstrated ability to effectively solve problems. Experienced in developing projects from initial requirements gathering to incorporating client feedback throughout the development process.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Skilled in utilizing HTML & CSS and leveraging current popular frameworks, including Angular and React, for web development. Experienced in creating responsive and interactive user interfaces with modern JavaScript/TypeScript and component-based architecture. Proficient in state management solutions like Redux, NgRx, and Context API, as well as styling with SCSS, Styled Components, and UI libraries like Material UI and Chakra UI.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Back-end developer skilled in building robust and scalable applications using Node.js and NestJS. Experienced in developing RESTful APIs and integrating with SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) databases. Familiar with ORMs like TypeORM and Prisma.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.description: Proficient in project management workflows using Git platforms such as Github, Gitea, and Gitlab. Leverage existing CI/CD pipelines for streamlined deployment and testing processes.

softwareDevelopment.title: Software development methodologies.
softwareDevelopment.description: Experienced in managing projects using Agile Scrum methodologies, including facilitating daily meetings, grooming meetings, sprint Planning sessions, sprint Reviews, Sprint Retrospectives, and more.
